title: Persist char_start and char_end for accepted claim quote spans
problem: claim_quotes rows store quote_text but char_start/char_end are always NULL. Fixture quote spans match source text exactly; offsets improve traceability without changing validation rules.
acceptance_criteria: When quote_span is an exact substring of chunk text, claim_quotes stores char_start and char_end.
Validation rules unchanged; missing_quote_span rejection unchanged.
GT02 passes and asserts offsets on accepted fixture claims.
Golden and pytest pass without Ollama.
non_goals: Do not change missing_quote_span validation logic.
Do not compute offsets for collapsed-whitespace-only matches in this ticket.
rollback_plan: Revert offset computation; char_start/char_end return to NULL.
